mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_cafe_kiosk_2603.cafe_package
is_active = true is_active = false
SELECT id, name, type, duration_minutes, base_price, extra_price_per_min, is_active AS active, updated_at FROM board_cafe_kiosk_2603.cafe_package WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_cafe_kiosk_2603.cafe_package (name, type, duration_minutes, base_price, extra_price_per_min, is_active) VALUES (#{name}, #{type}, #{durationMinutes}, #{basePrice}, #{extraPricePerMin}, true)
mapper.update: UPDATE board_cafe_kiosk_2603.cafe_package SET name = #{name}, type = #{type}, duration_minutes = #{durationMinutes}, base_price = #{basePrice}, extra_price_per_min = #{extraPricePerMin}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE board_cafe_kiosk_2603.cafe_package SET is_active = #{active}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
